variant: what results can i expect from tretinoin? hit me with the key numbers

request.message: what results can i expect from tretinoin? hit me with the key numbers

response_body.response: stack the cerave pm lotion or the tub cream (tub is heavier if you're really dry) with tretinoin. apply tretinoin first to totally dry skin, wait 20 min, then moisturizer seals it in. that sandwich method keeps irritation low and results high.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.

products.name: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream (Tub)
products.description: Heavy occlusive cream — good for very dry / eczema-prone skin.

products.name: The Ordinary Hyaluronic Acid 2% + B5
products.description: Triple-weight HA + B5 — apply to damp skin under moisturizer.
